class.name: CassieConstraint
class.brief_description: Base class for sketch constraints emitted during beautification.
class.description: Stores a world-space [member position] plus the "new curve data" triple (position, tangent, offset) populated by [method project_on] once a candidate curve has been fit. Subclassed by [CassieIntersectionConstraint] and [CassieMirrorPlaneConstraint]. The standalone [CassieSurfaceConstraint] is a separate Resource, not a Constraint subclass.

method.name: get_new_curve_offset
method.description: Returns the arc-length offset of the projected point along the curve last passed to [method project_on].

method.name: get_new_curve_position
method.description: Returns the closest point on the curve to [member position].

method.name: get_new_curve_tangent
method.description: Returns the curve tangent at the projected offset, or a zero vector when the curve is not baked.

method.name: project_on
method.description: Populates [method get_new_curve_position], [method get_new_curve_tangent], and [method get_new_curve_offset] by projecting [member position] onto [param curve]'s baked polyline.

method.name: project_on_anchor
method.description: Like [method project_on] but snaps the projection to the specified anchor of [param curve].
